titleStmt.title: SII 16.233: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 233. (A.R. No. 463 of 1920.) PĀLEM, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying in the prākāra of the Vēmula Veṅkaṭēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1481, (current), Kāḷayukti, Āśvija śu. 15, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1558 A.D., September 27, Tuesday, °27.

It records a gift of half the village of Mūrtirāyapuram to god Viṭhaladēva excluding the other half of it which was already an agrahāra granted to the Brāhmaṇas, by Viṭhalarājayyadēva-mahārāju, grandson of Kandanavōli Rāmarāju of Ātrēya-gōtra and Sōma-vaṁśa for the merit of his parents Mūrtirāju and Tirumalamma. The gift village is said to be situated in Pennakacherla-sīma of Jagatāpigutti-rājya which the donor is stated to have obtained as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1481 Agunēṁ
ṭi kāḷayukti saṁvatsara Āśvija śu 15 lu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadā
sivadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu
ratnaśiṁhvāsanārūḍhulai sāmrājyamuṁjē
yucuṁḍaṁgānu Anēkakōṭibrahmāṁḍanāyaka śrī pāṁ
ḍuraṁgaviṭhaladēvuniki Ātrēyagōtrapavitṛlaina sōmavaṁ
śōdbhavulaina kaṁdanavōli rāmarājuṁgāri pautṛlaina
mū¨rtirājuṁgāri putṛlaina viṭhalarājayyadēvamahārā
juluṁgāru śāṣṭāṁgadaṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci yicina bhū
dānadharmaśāsanapatrakramameṭlaṁnanu sadāsivadēvama
hārāyalu mā nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁcina jagatāpi
gutti rājyānakuṁ celle peṁnakace¨rla sīmalōni mū¨rttirā
yapuraṁ grāmānanu brāṁhmaluku Agrahāramayina [A]
¨rdhagrāmamukāka māku sāgivacce Adha grāmamunnu tathāti
thi sōmōparāgapuṇyakālamaṁdu tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdunu mā ta
lliṁgāru tirumalaṁmagārikini mātaṁḍrigāru mū¨rtirājuṁ
gārikini puṇyamugānu sahiraṇyōdakadhārāpūrvakaṁ The inscription is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 16.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
